mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.rule_type, r.rule_value, r.action_type, r.scope, r.priority, r.reason, r.category FROM admin_security_block_rule r LEFT JOIN admin_ip_block_batch b ON b.id = r.batch_id WHERE r.active = 1 AND (r.expires_at IS NULL OR r.expires_at > NOW()) AND (r.batch_id IS NULL OR b.active = 1) AND r.rule_type IN ('IP', 'SINGLE_IP', 'CIDR', 'IP_RANGE', 'RANGE', 'COUNTRY', 'ASN') ORDER BY r.priority DESC, r.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_block_access_log (request_id, user_id, request_uri, http_method, block_kind, block_match_type, block_target_key, block_rule_id, block_reason, client_ip, country_code, asn, cache_source, user_agent) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{userId}, #{requestUri}, #{httpMethod}, #{blockKind}, #{blockMatchType}, #{blockTargetKey}, #{blockRuleId}, #{blockReason}, #{clientIp}, #{countryCode}, #{asn}, #{cacheSource}, #{userAgent})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_security_block_rule r LEFT JOIN admin_ip_block_batch b ON b.id = r.batch_id SET r.is_effective_active = CASE WHEN r.active = 1 AND (r.expires_at IS NULL OR r.expires_at > NOW()) AND (r.batch_id IS NULL OR b.active = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
